params.name: La mer
params.description:
On Mar 14, 1905 AD, Debussy's La Mer was first introduced to the world.
La Mer is the largest symphonic music work by the famous composer Debussy. He used his memories of the sea as inspiration to create this impressionistic piece, using notes to describe vivid scenes of the sea. Due to its rich expressiveness, it was nicknamed Symphonic Sketches and has been praised by people for generations.
